name: Barbell Bench Press
setupNotes: Arch lower back slightly, keep feet planted. For your height, ensure wide enough grip to avoid excessive tricep dominance.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
setupNotes: 30-45 degree incline. Focus on a deep stretch at the bottom.

name: Chest-Supported Row
setupNotes: Ideal for your L4-L5 history. Keep chest glued to the pad to eliminate momentum.

name: Neutral Grip Lat Pulldown
setupNotes: Neutral grip is safer for your elbow (golfer's elbow). Pull to upper chest, not behind neck.

name: Goblet Squat
setupNotes: Alternative to Barbell Squat for lower back safety. Upright torso is key.

name: Romanian Deadlift (RDL)
setupNotes: Due to your 181.5cm height, stop at mid-shin to protect L4-L5. Focus on the hip hinge.

name: Hammer Curls
setupNotes: Neutral grip reduces strain on the medial epicondyle (elbow pain).

name: Seated Dumbbell Overhead Press
setupNotes: Seated version provides more stability for the lower back.
